title: The Origin of Spin-Alignment of Dark Matter Subhalos
summary: Subhalo spin is essential for modeling galaxy formation and controlling systematic uncertainties in intrinsic alignment (IA) studies. However, the physical mechanisms governing subhalo spin acquisition within the tidal environments of host halos remain poorly understood. In this work, we investigate the alignment between subhalo and host halo spins using the high-resolution cosmological $N$-body simulation, Shin-Uchuu. We find that the spin alignment between subhalos and host halos becomes increasingly pronounced toward the central regions. Our analysis reveals that subhalos typically acquire spin in the same direction as their orbital angular momentum. Since the orbital angular momentum of most subhalos is aligned with the host halo spin, an overall alignment between subhalo and host spins emerges. When classified by orbital orientation, however, subhalo spins in the inner regions are found to be oriented perpendicularly or anti-parallel to the host spin for polar and retrograde orbits, respectively. These results provide strong evidence that subhalo spins are acquired through torques exerted by the tidal field of the host halo. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the mass ratio and the radial distance from the host center are the primary parameters governing subhalo spin alignment, while the dependence on the accretion redshift is found to be negligible.

AI.tldr: 利用高分辨率宇宙学N体模拟研究子晕与主晕自旋的排列关系，发现子晕自旋主要通过与主晕潮汐场的相互作用获得，其排列方向受质量比和径向距离影响显著
AI.motivation: 子晕自旋对星系形成建模和本征排列（IA）研究中的系统误差控制至关重要，但子晕在主晕潮汐环境中获得自旋的物理机制仍不清楚
AI.method: 使用高分辨率宇宙学N体模拟Shin-Uchuu，研究子晕与主晕自旋的排列关系，分析轨道角动量、轨道方向、质量比、径向距离和吸积红移等因素的影响
AI.result: 1) 子晕与主晕自旋排列在中心区域更明显；2) 子晕自旋通常与轨道角动量同向获得；3) 大多数子晕轨道角动量与主晕自旋对齐，导致整体排列；4) 按轨道方向分类时，内区子晕自旋在极轨道和逆行轨道中分别垂直于或反平行于主晕自旋；5) 质量比和径向距离是主要控制参数，吸积红移影响可忽略
AI.conclusion: 子晕自旋主要通过主晕潮汐场施加的力矩获得，质量比和径向距离是控制自旋排列的主要参数，这为理解子晕自旋获取机制提供了有力证据

title: Hunting for the First Explosions at the High-Redshift Frontier
summary: The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) has spectroscopically confirmed galaxies up to $z\sim14$, 300 Myr after the Big Bang, and several candidates have been discovered at $z\sim15-25$, with one candidate as high as $z\sim30$, only 100 Myr after the Big Bang. Such objects are unexpected, since theoretical studies have not predicted the existence of detectable galaxies at $z\sim30$. While any $z\sim30$ candidates may be contaminants at lower redshifts, we explore whether such extreme redshift sources could be consistent with hyper-energetic transient events linked to the formation of the first, metal-free, stars. Specifically, we consider pair-instability supernovae (PISNe), a predicted class of extreme thermonuclear explosions that leave no remnant behind. Using cosmological simulations, we investigate an overdense cosmic region, where star formation and subsequent PISNe occur at $z\sim30-40$, even within standard cosmology. Assessing the likelihood of such a region, the corresponding number of PISNe at $z\gtrsim20$, and their observed flux, we find that JWST has a non-negligible chance to detect a PISN event at extremely high redshifts. If a transient event were confirmed at $z\sim30$, this would provide a direct glimpse into the epoch of first star formation, dramatically extending the empirical reach of astronomy.

AI.tldr: JWST发现z~30的候选星系，理论难以解释。研究探索这些极端红移源是否可能是与第一代恒星形成相关的超能瞬变事件，特别是对不稳定性超新星。通过宇宙学模拟发现，JWST有不可忽视的机会探测到极高红移的PISN事件。
AI.motivation: JWST观测到z~30的候选星系，这在现有理论中难以解释。研究旨在探索这些极端红移源是否可能是与第一代恒星形成相关的超能瞬变事件，特别是对不稳定性超新星，以理解早期宇宙的恒星形成过程。
AI.method: 使用宇宙学模拟研究一个过密的宇宙区域，其中恒星形成和随后的对不稳定性超新星发生在z~30-40。评估这种区域的可能性、相应z≳20的PISN数量及其观测通量。
AI.result: 研究发现JWST有非零概率探测到极高红移的对不稳定性超新星事件。即使在标准宇宙学框架内，也可能存在这样的过密区域产生PISN事件。
AI.conclusion: 如果能在z~30确认瞬变事件，将直接窥见第一代恒星形成的时代，极大扩展天文学的实证范围。PISN可能是解释JWST观测到的极端红移候选源的一种机制。

title: Star Formation in Galaxy Collisions: Dependence on Impact Velocity and Gas Mass of Galaxies in GADGET-4 Simulations
comment: 17 pages and 17 figures. Keywords: star formation; galaxy mergers; hydrodynamic simulations; GADGET-4
summary: This work investigates variations in the star formation rate during galaxy collisions when the initial conditions of velocity and gas mass are altered. For this purpose, hydrodynamic simulations were performed using the GADGET-4 code, with initial conditions generated by the Galstep and SnapshotJoiner programs. Systems of two galaxies on a head-on collision course were modeled with relative initial velocities ranging from 100 km/s to 1000 km/s, considering two scenarios: the first with identical galaxies, and the second with galaxies of different sizes. In simulations of systems with higher initial relative velocities, both found more intense peaks in the star formation rate, triggered by the first contact of the collision, followed by a strong decline caused by gas dispersion. In contrast, for systems with lower initial velocities, mergers between galaxies were observed, leading to multiple peaks in the star formation rate. A greater initial distance between galaxies has also been linked to whether or not the galaxy system merges, since it implies longer timescales for gravitational action, which leads to higher relative velocities at the moment of collision. Furthermore, the star formation rate in galaxies was found to have a clear dependence on initial gas content. Furthermore, the initial gas content in galaxies was found to have a clear dependence on star formation rates. Overall, our results show that the relative impact velocity, the initial distance between the galaxies, and the gas content are important parameters for analyzing the star formation rate in colliding galaxies.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过流体动力学模拟探究了星系碰撞中恒星形成率的变化，发现初始相对速度、星系间初始距离和气体含量是影响恒星形成率的关键参数。
AI.motivation: 研究星系碰撞过程中恒星形成率的变化，特别关注初始条件（速度和气体质量）如何影响碰撞过程中的恒星形成活动。
AI.method: 使用GADGET-4代码进行流体动力学模拟，通过Galstep和SnapshotJoiner程序生成初始条件。模拟两个星系正面碰撞，初始相对速度范围100-1000 km/s，考虑两种情景：相同星系和不同大小星系。
AI.result: 较高初始相对速度的系统在首次接触时产生更强烈的恒星形成率峰值，随后因气体弥散而急剧下降；较低初始速度的系统发生星系合并，导致多个恒星形成率峰值。星系间初始距离影响是否发生合并，气体含量与恒星形成率有明确依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 相对冲击速度、星系间初始距离和气体含量是分析碰撞星系中恒星形成率的重要参数，这些因素共同决定了碰撞过程中恒星形成的动态特征。

title: Composite Bulges - V. Detecting signatures of gas inflows in IFU data: The MUSE view of ionised gas kinematics in nearby galaxies
comment: 22 pages, 9 figures (Appendices: 40 pages with figures), submitted to MNRAS
summary: Using VLT/MUSE data, we study the ionised-gas kinematics in a mass- and volume-limited ($M_* \geq 10^{10} M_\odot$, $D \leq 20$\,Mpc) sample of 21 nearby galaxies to identify signatures of extended shocks within their inner kiloparsec, which appear as coherent velocity jumps in kinematic maps. By removing angular momentum, shocks in gas cause inflows, which can trigger nuclear star formation and fuel AGN activity. To identify the signatures of extended shocks, we examine residual velocity fields after subtracting a modelled rotating disc, and we study velocity difference between various gas tracers. Combining our kinematic analysis with BPT ionisation diagnostic maps and dust morphology, we find that 11 of 21 galaxies ($\sim$52%) show extended shock signatures with velocity jumps consistent with models of bar-driven shocks. This is likely a lower limit, as three additional galaxies ($\sim$15%) exhibit shocks along bars, potentially reaching the nucleus but obscured by AGN outflows. We trace shock signatures inwards close to the resolution limit, which suggests that shocks may be the prevailing mechanism of inflow in the central kpc of galaxies. The only two unbarred galaxies in our sample are also the only systems with unperturbed kinematics and no shocks, strongly linking the perturbed gas dynamics in centres of galaxies to the presence of bars. All galaxies with inner bars show LINER- or Seyfert-like nuclear emission, whereas galaxies without inner bars exhibit all emission types, indicating that regardless of gas supply, inner bars suppress star formation in galactic nuclei.

AI.tldr: 利用VLT/MUSE数据研究21个近邻星系电离气体运动学，发现约52%星系存在延伸激波特征，这些激波可能通过移除角动量驱动气体流入，触发核区恒星形成和AGN活动。
AI.motivation: 研究星系中心千秒差距范围内的延伸激波特征，了解激波如何通过移除气体角动量驱动内流，从而触发核区恒星形成和AGN活动，探索星系中心气体动力学与棒结构的关系。
AI.method: 使用VLT/MUSE数据对21个近邻星系进行电离气体运动学分析，通过减去模型旋转盘后的残差速度场识别激波特征，结合BPT电离诊断图和尘埃形态进行综合研究。
AI.result: 21个星系中11个（约52%）显示延伸激波特征，速度跳跃与棒驱动激波模型一致；3个星系（约15%）沿棒存在激波但可能被AGN外流遮蔽；所有无棒星系均显示未受扰动的运动学且无激波特征。
AI.conclusion: 激波可能是星系中心千秒差距范围内气体流入的主要机制，棒结构与扰动气体动力学密切相关，内棒可能抑制星系核区的恒星形成。

title: Exactly solved model of a one dimensional self gravitating system
summary: A model one-dimensional self consistent steady state collisionless self-gravitating system in which all the particles have the same energy is presented. This has the remarkable property that the position and velocity of the particles orbiting in their own self consistent potential are given exactly, in terms of time, by the truncations of sine and cosine functions to the first two terms in their respective Taylor series. The potential and density also have simple analytic expressions in terms of time as parameter. It is not being claimed that this system has any direct astronomical application. However, it does motivate a conjecture about the behaviour of the density, potential, and orbits near caustics in simulations of cold collisionless dark matter. It is a rather surprising result which might interest practitioners of stellar dynamics and serve as an elementary example in teaching the subject.

AI.tldr: 提出一个一维自洽稳态无碰撞自引力系统，其中所有粒子具有相同能量，其轨道运动可用正弦和余弦函数的前两项泰勒展开精确描述。
AI.motivation: 构建一个具有解析解的简单自引力系统模型，为研究冷暗物质模拟中的密度、势能和轨道行为提供理论参考，并作为恒星动力学的教学示例。
AI.method: 建立一维自洽稳态无碰撞自引力系统模型，所有粒子具有相同能量，通过将正弦和余弦函数截断到泰勒展开的前两项来精确描述粒子在自洽势中的位置和速度。
AI.result: 获得了具有简单解析表达式的系统：粒子的位置和速度可精确用时间参数表示，势能和密度也有简单的解析表达式，为研究冷暗物质模拟中的焦散线附近行为提供了理论依据。
AI.conclusion: 该模型虽无直接天文应用价值，但为理解冷暗物质模拟中的轨道行为提供了有趣的数学框架，可作为恒星动力学的教学示例，并启发关于焦散线附近密度、势能和轨道行为的猜想。

title: Probing ionized bubbles around luminous sources during reionization with SKA 21-cm observations
summary: Detecting and characterizing individual ionized bubbles during the Epoch of Reionization (EoR) using the redshifted HI 21-cm signal provides a direct probe of the early ionizing sources and the intergalactic medium. We develop and validate a computationally efficient estimator that operates on gridded visibilities to detect ionized bubbles. This serves as an accurate alternative to the more computationally demanding bare estimator that uses all baselines and frequency channels. Further, we employ a non-parametric foreground-subtraction method based on Gaussian process regression, which minimizes loss of the HI 21-cm signal and yields improved signal-to-noise ratios. Our analysis indicates that ionized bubbles at redshifts $z \sim 7 - 8$ can be detected with SNR $\gtrsim 10$ using $\sim 100$ hours of SKA1-Low AA$^*$ and AA4 observations. We further derive a scaling relation that connects the SNR to the bubble radius, redshift, total observing time, and the mean neutral hydrogen fraction of the surrounding IGM. This helps to quickly predict the observational outcome for any planned observations and is, therefore, useful for devising observational strategies. Finally, we apply a Bayesian likelihood framework with Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling to the residual visibilities to recover ionized bubble properties, including radius, position, and the mean neutral fraction. The resulting posterior distributions demonstrate accurate recovery of the bubble parameters. This confirms the feasibility of robustly characterizing individual ionized regions with the SKA1-Low.

AI.tldr: 开发了一种基于网格化可见度的计算高效方法，用于探测再电离时期的电离气泡，结合高斯过程回归进行前景扣除，可在SKA1-Low观测中实现高信噪比探测，并通过贝叶斯框架准确恢复气泡参数。
AI.motivation: 通过再电离时期的HI 21-cm信号探测和表征单个电离气泡，可以直接研究早期电离源和星系际介质，但现有方法计算量大且信号提取困难。
AI.method: 开发了基于网格化可见度的计算高效估计器替代全基线方法，采用基于高斯过程回归的非参数前景扣除方法减少信号损失，建立信噪比与气泡参数的标度关系，并应用贝叶斯似然框架和MCMC采样恢复气泡特性。
AI.result: 在红移z∼7-8时，使用SKA1-Low约100小时观测可实现SNR≳10的电离气泡探测；建立了信噪比与气泡半径、红移、观测时间和中性氢分数的标度关系；后验分布显示能准确恢复气泡半径、位置和中性分数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证实了使用SKA1-Low稳健表征单个电离区域的可行性，为观测策略制定提供了实用工具，能够高效预测不同观测条件下的探测效果。

title: A Galactic Supernova Remnant Candidate at l =25.8, b=+0.2 Revealed by Near-Infrared Imaging and Spectroscopy
comment: 34 pages, 7 figures, Submitted to AAS journal
summary: We present high-resolution near-infrared spectroscopic observations of the newly identified supernova remnant (SNR) candidate G25.8+0.2 obtained with the Immersion Grating Infrared Spectrograph (IGRINS) on the Harlan J. Smith Telescope. The source was originally discovered in the UKIRT Wide-field Infrared Survey for Fe+ (UWIFE; Lee et al. 2014). Our spectra reveal multiple kinematic components in the [Fe II] 1.644 um emission. The high-velocity components exhibit elevated [Fe II]/Br gamma ratios characteristic of shock excitation, while the low-velocity components are dominated by hydrogen and helium recombination lines and are consistent with photoionized gas, indicating an H II-region origin. G25.8+0.2 lies within the G26 complex, a large (~15'x 30', corresponding to ~28 pc x 57 pc at a distance of 6.5 kpc) star-forming region in the inner Galaxy. The shock-excited [Fe II] filaments closely trace the morphology of the bright radio shell that partially encloses centrally filled soft X-ray emission, strongly suggesting recent supernova activity in this region. We discuss the physical nature of G25.8+0.2 and its relationship to the surrounding G26 star-forming complex. In addition, we derive the extinction toward the source using Brackett-line ratios and constrain the spectral types of the dominant ionizing stars from the He I 2.058 um/Br gamma line ratios.

AI.tldr: 利用IGRINS红外光谱仪观测新发现的超新星遗迹候选体G25.8+0.2，发现其[Fe II]发射存在多个运动学成分，高速成分显示激波激发特征，低速成分符合H II区光致电离起源，该源位于G26恒星形成复合体中，与射电壳层形态一致，表明该区域存在近期超新星活动。
AI.motivation: 研究新发现的超新星遗迹候选体G25.8+0.2的物理性质及其与周围G26恒星形成复合体的关系，通过高分辨率红外光谱分析其激发机制和运动学特征。
AI.method: 使用Harlan J. Smith望远镜上的IGRINS红外光谱仪对G25.8+0.2进行高分辨率近红外光谱观测，分析[Fe II] 1.644微米发射线的运动学成分、[Fe II]/Brγ比值、氢和氦复合线，利用Brackett线比值推导消光，通过He I 2.058微米/Brγ线比值约束主要电离恒星的谱型。
AI.result: 光谱显示[Fe II]发射存在多个运动学成分：高速成分具有升高的[Fe II]/Brγ比值，符合激波激发特征；低速成分以氢和氦复合线为主，符合光致电离气体特征，表明H II区起源。激波激发的[Fe II]细丝与明亮射电壳层形态紧密对应，该壳层部分包围着中心填充的软X射线发射，强烈暗示该区域存在近期超新星活动。
AI.conclusion: G25.8+0.2是一个位于G26恒星形成复合体中的超新星遗迹候选体，其光谱特征表明同时存在激波激发区域和光致电离区域，与射电和X射线观测结果一致，证实了该区域的近期超新星活动，为研究超新星遗迹与恒星形成区的相互作用提供了重要案例。

title: E-XQR-30: Evidence for an Increase in the Ionization State of Metal Absorbers from z~6 to z~2
summary: We investigate the evolution of the ionization state of metal-enriched gas in and around galaxies near the epoch of reionization using a sample of 488 metal absorption systems at 4.3<z<6.3 from the E-XQR-30 survey. We classify the absorption systems based on whether they display only low-ionization absorption (CII, SiII, MgII), only high-ionization absorption (CIV, SiIV), or both. The percentage of low-ionization-only systems decreases from 24% at $z\sim$6 to 2% at $z\sim$4.3, whilst the fraction of high-ionization-only systems increases from 52% to 82%. For mixed absorbers (with both low and high ionization absorption), we use the column density ratios log(N_CII/N_CIV) and log(N_SiII/N_SiIV) to quantify the average ionization as a function of redshift. The log(N_SiII/N_SiIV) ratio does not change significantly over 5$\lesssim z \lesssim$6.3. We combine the E-XQR-30 log(N_CII/N_CIV) measurements with literature measurements at $z\sim$2-4 and find that the log(N_CII/N_CIV) ratio declines by a factor of $\sim$20 between $z\sim$6 and $z\sim$2. To explore possible drivers of this evolution, we run photoionization models of gas slabs illuminated by a uniform UV background at fixed density, metallicity and HI column density. We find that the increase in the ionization state of metal absorbers towards lower redshifts can likely be explained by some combination of 1) an increase in the metallicity of CIV-absorbing gas and 2) a decrease in the typical HI column densities of the absorbing gas, driven by the declining cosmic mean density and a rapid rise in the strength of the UV background during the final stages of reionization.

AI.tldr: 研究利用E-XQR-30巡天的488个金属吸收系统（4.3<z<6.3），发现电离状态随红移演化：低电离系统比例从z~6的24%降至z~4.3的2%，高电离系统比例从52%增至82%。log(N_CII/N_CIV)比值在z~6到z~2间下降约20倍。
AI.motivation: 研究再电离时期附近星系及其周围金属富集气体的电离状态演化，了解宇宙再电离过程中气体电离状态的变化规律及其驱动因素。
AI.method: 使用E-XQR-30巡天的488个金属吸收系统（4.3<z<6.3），根据吸收特征分为低电离（CII、SiII、MgII）、高电离（CIV、SiIV）和混合类型。通过柱密度比值log(N_CII/N_CIV)和log(N_SiII/N_SiIV)量化平均电离状态。结合文献数据（z~2-4），运行光致电离模型分析演化驱动因素。
AI.result: 低电离系统比例从z~6的24%降至z~4.3的2%，高电离系统比例从52%增至82%。log(N_SiII/N_SiIV)在5≲z≲6.3无明显变化，但log(N_CII/N_CIV)在z~6到z~2间下降约20倍。模型表明演化可能由CIV吸收气体金属丰度增加和吸收气体HI柱密度减少共同驱动。
AI.conclusion: 金属吸收体电离状态向低红移增加的趋势可能由两个因素共同解释：1）CIV吸收气体金属丰度增加；2）吸收气体典型HI柱密度减少，这由宇宙平均密度下降和再电离末期UV背景强度快速上升驱动。

title: Bounce Inflation with Dynamical Dark Energy in Light of DESI DR2
comment: 10 pages and 4 figures. All comments are welcome
summary: Recently, the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument Data Release 2 (DESI DR2) suggests that the dark energy in our universe might be evolving, favoring the Chevallier-Polarski-Linder (CPL) parameterization and a lower Hubble constant. In our previous work, it has been reported that cosmological model with the non-singular bounce inflation (BI) scenario and $Λ$CDM might alleviate the Hubble tension into 3$σ$ confidence. In this paper, we study the cosmological model of BI with a dynamical dark energy. We find that individual consideration of the CPL parameterization and the data \texttt{DESI DR2} tend to larger Hubble constants for both BI and power law (PL) case with cosmic microwave background (CMB) data. Employing BI with combined CPL parameterization and \texttt{DESI DR2}, we obtain the Hubble constant $H_ 0 = 65.2^{ + 1.8}_{ - 2.2} \ \mathrm{km} \cdot \mathrm{s}^{ -1 } \cdot \mathrm{Mpc}^{ -1 }$, which is larger than $H_ 0 = 64.0 \pm 2.1 \ \mathrm{km} \cdot \mathrm{s}^{ -1 } \cdot \mathrm{Mpc}^{ -1 }$ for the PL case. After considering nontrivial weak lensing effect and spatial curvature as well as adding \texttt{Pantheon+}, BI fits 3.1$σ$ confidence of $Λ$CDM with $w_ 0 = -0.919 \pm 0.038$ and $w_{ \mathrm{a}} = -0.37 \pm 0.12$, and it prefers evolving dark energy than the PL case with $w_ 0 = -0.960 \pm 0.074$ and $w_{ \mathrm{a}} = -0.15^{ +0.28}_{ -0.25}$.

AI.tldr: DESI DR2数据支持暗能量演化，本文研究非奇异反弹暴胀模型与动态暗能量结合，发现能获得更大的哈勃常数，缓解哈勃张力
AI.motivation: DESI DR2数据表明暗能量可能演化，支持CPL参数化且哈勃常数较低。先前研究发现非奇异反弹暴胀模型与ΛCDM结合可将哈勃张力缓解至3σ置信度。本文旨在研究反弹暴胀模型与动态暗能量的结合效果
AI.method: 研究反弹暴胀模型与动态暗能量（CPL参数化）的结合，使用DESI DR2数据、CMB数据、Pantheon+数据，考虑弱引力透镜效应和空间曲率的影响
AI.result: 反弹暴胀模型结合CPL参数化和DESI DR2数据得到哈勃常数H₀=65.2^{+1.8}_{-2.2} km·s⁻¹·Mpc⁻¹，高于幂律模型的H₀=64.0±2.1。考虑弱透镜和空间曲率后，反弹暴胀模型在3.1σ置信度内拟合ΛCDM，暗能量演化参数w₀=-0.919±0.038，w_a=-0.37±0.12
AI.conclusion: 反弹暴胀模型与动态暗能量结合能更好地缓解哈勃张力，获得更大的哈勃常数，且支持暗能量演化，优于幂律模型

title: A Tale of Two Dust Disks in Our Milky
summary: Cosmic dust plays a vital role in stellar and galactic formation and evolution, but its three-dimensional structure in the Milky Way has remained unclear due to insufficient precise reddening and distance measurements. Although early studies typically adopted a single-disk model, we detect two distinct components at Galactocentric distances of 5-14 kpc, enabled by photometric, spectroscopic, and astrometric measurements of over 5 million stars. The thin dust disk's scale height increases radially from 60 to 200 pc, while the thick disk grows from 300 to 800 pc. For the first time, we find the thin and thick dust disk correlates spatially with molecular and atomic hydrogen disk, respectively. The thin, thick, and combined disks have scale lengths of 9.6+1.2-1.1 kpc, 4.2+0.4-0.3 kpc, and 6.6+0.3-0.3 kpc, respectively. The gas-to-dust ratio shows an exponential radial gradient, increasing from around 60 at 5 kpc to around 470 at 14 kpc. These findings provide new insights into dust morphology in the Galaxy and raise fundamental questions that require further investigation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现银河系星际尘埃存在薄盘和厚盘两个独立成分，其空间分布分别与分子氢和原子氢盘相关，揭示了尘埃的三维结构特征。
AI.motivation: 宇宙尘埃在恒星和星系形成演化中起关键作用，但银河系中尘埃的三维结构一直不清楚，主要原因是缺乏精确的红化和距离测量数据。
AI.method: 利用超过500万颗恒星的测光、光谱和天体测量数据，在5-14千秒差距的银河系中心距离范围内分析尘埃分布，首次检测到两个独立的尘埃成分。
AI.result: 发现薄尘埃盘和厚尘埃盘，其标高随径向距离增加：薄盘从60pc增至200pc，厚盘从300pc增至800pc。薄盘与分子氢盘空间相关，厚盘与原子氢盘相关。尘埃盘标长分别为9.6kpc、4.2kpc和6.6kpc。气体-尘埃比呈指数径向梯度，从5kpc处的约60增至14kpc处的约470。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为银河系尘埃形态提供了新见解，并提出了需要进一步研究的基本问题，包括尘埃成分与气体成分的关联机制等。

title: Late-time Background Constraints on Linear and Non-linear Interacting Dark Energy after DESI DR2
summary: In this study, we present observational constraints on a class of phenomenological interacting dark energy (IDE) models that admit analytical solutions for the Hubble parameter $H(z)$. We consider a set of five linear and three non-linear IDE scenarios, encompassing both interactions proportional to the dark matter and/or dark energy densities, as well as non-linear combinations of the two. For all eight IDE models, we find a better fit than $Λ$CDM from a $Δχ^2$ analysis for both combinations of datasets considered. When using the Akaike Information Criterion ($Δ$AIC), we find a similarly improved fit in all cases, except for one dataset combination in $Q=3Hδρ_{\rm de}$. Our analysis also shows a preference for sign-switching interactions, with energy transfer from dark energy to dark matter at low redshift, reversing direction at higher redshift. These results should be interpreted with caution, as the latter direction of energy transfer is accompanied by negative dark energy densities in the past, which may be unphysical. Models that do not allow sign-changing behaviour instead show a preference for energy flow from dark matter to dark energy, and hence negative dark energy densities. The only exceptions are $Q=3Hδρ_{\rm de}$ and $Q=3Hδ\left(\tfrac{ρ_{\rm de}^2}{ρ_{\rm dm}+ρ_{\rm de}}\right)$, which exhibit energy flow in the opposite direction. Furthermore, for all interactions considered, we find a phantom-divide crossing in the effective dark energy equation of state $w^{\rm eff}_{\rm de}$, with the dark energy density decreasing ($w^{\rm eff}_{\rm de}>-1$) at present and at low redshift, while increasing ($w^{\rm eff}_{\rm de}<-1$) in the past at high redshift. These results highlight the promising, but problematic, nature of dark sector interactions, as well as the need to extend the analysis using early-time physics and datasets.

AI.tldr: 该研究对8种相互作用暗能量模型进行观测约束分析，发现所有模型都比ΛCDM拟合更好，但存在暗能量密度为负等非物理问题，需要谨慎解释。
AI.motivation: 研究相互作用暗能量模型的动机是为了探索暗能量与暗物质之间可能存在相互作用的可能性，这类模型能够提供比标准宇宙学模型ΛCDM更好的观测拟合，并可能解决宇宙学中的一些未解之谜。
AI.method: 研究考虑了8种相互作用暗能量模型（5种线性和3种非线性），这些模型允许哈勃参数H(z)的解析解。使用Δχ²分析和赤池信息准则（ΔAIC）评估模型拟合质量，分析能量转移方向的变化以及有效暗能量状态方程w_de^eff的幻象边界穿越行为。
AI.result: 所有8种IDE模型都比ΛCDM拟合更好（除Q=3Hδρ_de在一个数据集组合外）。研究发现偏好符号切换的相互作用，即低红移时能量从暗能量转移到暗物质，高红移时方向反转。但后一种方向伴随着过去负的暗能量密度，可能非物理。所有模型都显示有效暗能量状态方程存在幻象边界穿越。
AI.conclusion: 相互作用暗能量模型虽然观测拟合表现良好，但存在暗能量密度为负等非物理问题，需要谨慎解释。研究强调了暗区相互作用的潜在前景和问题，并指出需要结合早期物理和更多数据集进行扩展分析。

title: Indications of a Late-Time Transition to a Strongly Interacting Dark Sector
summary: We explore the transition from the $Λ$CDM to an interacting dark sector by introducing a model with a redshift threshold that controls the onset of the energy transfer between the dark energy and the dark matter. Below the transition redshift, the interaction between dark matter and dark energy becomes active, while at earlier times the cosmological evolution coincides with that of $Λ$CDM. This approach allows us to determine the epoch in the comic history where the interacting effects have an impact in the description of the dark sector. We constrain the free parameters of the model using late-time cosmological observations, namely Cosmic Chronometers, DESI DR2 Baryonic Acoustic Oscillations, and Supernova data from the Pantheon Plus, Union3.0, and DES-Dovekie catalogues. The analysis provides an indication of a strong interacting term that describes energy transfer from dark energy to dark matter, which is activated at low redshifts. The PantheonPlus sample provides a threshold of $z_{T}<0.624$, the Union3.0 sample yields $z_{T}=0.400_{-0.23}^{+0.021}$, and the DES-Dovekie sample gives $z_{T}=0.371_{-0.26}^{+0.028}$. The model fits the data in a similar way to the CPL parametrization, without the dark energy to cross the phantom divide line.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种具有红移阈值的相互作用暗物质-暗能量模型，该阈值控制着暗能量向暗物质能量转移的开始时间，在阈值以下相互作用激活，早期宇宙演化与ΛCDM一致。
AI.motivation: 探索从ΛCDM模型到相互作用暗物质-暗能量模型的过渡，通过引入红移阈值来确定相互作用在宇宙历史中何时开始影响暗物质-暗能量描述。
AI.method: 提出具有红移阈值的相互作用暗物质-暗能量模型，使用晚期宇宙学观测数据（宇宙计时器、DESI DR2重子声学振荡、Pantheon Plus、Union3.0和DES-Dovekie超新星数据）约束模型参数。
AI.result: 分析表明存在强烈的暗能量向暗物质能量转移项，在低红移时激活。不同数据集给出的阈值分别为：PantheonPlus样本z_T<0.624，Union3.0样本z_T=0.400_{-0.23}^{+0.021}，DES-Dovekie样本z_T=0.371_{-0.26}^{+0.028}。
AI.conclusion: 该模型与CPL参数化拟合数据效果相似，但暗能量不会跨越幻影分界线，为理解暗物质-暗能量相互作用提供了新的框架。

title: Cosmic Collider Gravitational Waves sourced by Right-handed Neutrino production from Bubbles: Testing Seesaw, Leptogenesis and Dark Matter
summary: We study a minimal type-I seesaw framework in which a first-order phase transition (FOPT), driven by a singlet scalar, produces right-handed neutrinos (RHNs) through bubble collisions, realizing a cosmic-scale collider that probes ultra-high energy scales. The resulting RHN distribution sources novel low-frequency gravitational-waves (GWs) in addition to the standard bubble-collision contribution. A stable lightest RHN can account for the observed dark matter (DM) relic abundance for masses as low as $M_{1} \equiv m_{\rm DM} \gtrsim 10^{6}\,\mathrm{GeV}$, with the associated novel GW signal accessible in LISA, ET and upcoming LVK detectors. If the RHNs are unstable, their CP-violating decays generate the observed baryon asymmetry via leptogenesis for $M_{1} \gtrsim 10^{11}\,\mathrm{GeV}$ and phase transition temperatures $T_* \gtrsim 10^{6}\,\mathrm{GeV}$, for which the novel GW spectrum is detectable in ET, BBO and upcoming LVK. If RHN decays also populate a dark-sector fermion with mass $m_χ \in [10^{-4},10^{4}],\mathrm{GeV}$, successful co-genesis of baryons and asymmetric dark matter occurs for $T_* \gtrsim 10^{7}\,\mathrm{GeV}$ and $M_{1} \gtrsim 10^{9}\,\mathrm{GeV}$, naturally explaining $Ω_{\rm DM} \simeq 5Ω_{\rm B}$. The corresponding GW signals are testable with LISA, ET, and BBO. Finally, we analyze a UV-complete multi-Majoron model, based on a global $U(1)_N \times U(1)_{\rm B-L}$ extension, motivated from the hierarchy of lepton masses, which we dub as Mojaron collider. The corresponding FOPT in this model leaves a distinctive GW signature arising from RHN production during $U(1)_N$ symmetry breaking detectable by BBO, ET and upcoming LVK. Successful leptogenesis is realized for heaviest RHN mass $M_3 \sim 10^{10}\,\mathrm{GeV}$ and a $U(1)_N$ breaking vev $v_2 \sim \mathcal{O}(\mathrm{TeV})$, which sets the seesaw scale.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种最小I型跷跷板框架，其中单重态标量驱动的一阶相变通过气泡碰撞产生右手中微子，实现了一个探测超高能标的宇宙尺度对撞机。由此产生的RHN分布产生了新颖的低频引力波信号，并探讨了暗物质、重子不对称和暗物质-重子协同产生的可能性。
AI.motivation: 研究如何通过宇宙一阶相变产生右手中微子，并利用这一过程作为宇宙尺度对撞机来探测超高能物理。同时探索该框架下暗物质、重子不对称性以及暗物质与重子协同产生的可能性，并寻找可观测的引力波信号。
AI.method: 采用最小I型跷跷板框架，通过单重态标量驱动的一阶相变产生右手中微子。分析气泡碰撞产生的RHN分布及其对引力波信号的贡献。研究稳定RHN作为暗物质的可能性，以及不稳定RHN通过CP破坏衰变产生重子不对称性。进一步扩展研究暗区费米子的协同产生机制，并构建基于全局U(1)_N × U(1)_B-L对称性扩展的UV完全多Majoron模型。
AI.result: 1) 稳定最轻RHN可作为暗物质候选者，质量低至10^6 GeV，相关新颖引力波信号可在LISA、ET和LVK探测器中被探测到；2) 不稳定RHN通过CP破坏衰变可实现重子不对称性产生，要求M1 ≥ 10^11 GeV，相变温度T* ≥ 10^6 GeV，相应引力波谱可在ET、BBO和LVK中被探测；3) RHN衰变还可产生暗区费米子，实现重子与不对称暗物质的协同产生，自然解释Ω_DM ≈ 5Ω_B；4) 多Majoron模型中的FOPT产生独特的引力波特征，可在BBO、ET和LVK中被探测，成功实现轻子生成要求最重RHN质量M3 ∼ 10^10 GeV。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了一阶相变驱动的右手中微子产生机制可作为宇宙尺度对撞机，为探测超高能物理提供了新途径。该框架不仅能够解释暗物质、重子不对称性和暗物质-重子协同产生，还产生了可观测的引力波信号，为未来引力波探测器（如LISA、ET、BBO、LVK）提供了重要的探测目标。多Majoron模型的UV完全实现进一步增强了该框架的理论基础。

title: The origin of strong $α$-element bimodalities in FIRE simulations of Milky Way-mass galaxies
summary: One of the Milky Way's characteristic features is a strongly bimodal distribution of $α$-process elements, such as Mg, at fixed [Fe/H] in stellar abundances. We examine patterns in [Mg/Fe] versus [Fe/H] in FIRE-2 simulations of Milky Way-mass galaxies. Out of 16 galaxies, 4 are capable of producing a strongly bimodal distribution. In all four galaxies, the high-$α$ population corresponds to an older, radially-compact, thick disk, and the low-$α$ population corresponds to a younger, radially-extended, thin disk, similar to the MW.The transition from high- to low-$α$ took $0.3-1.2\Gyr$ and began $5.5-6.5\Gyr$ ago. [Mg/Fe] decreased at relatively fixed [Fe/H], both in the galaxy overall and at fixed radii: Fe enrichment nearly balanced gas accretion (and therefore dilution), but Mg enrichment was weaker. Importantly, this transition occurred during a period of relatively low gas fraction ($5-15\%$), immediately after a rapid decline in star formation (halving within a few hundred Myr), which caused an increase in Fe-producing white-dwarf supernovae relative to Mg-producing core-collapse supernovae. Only one case coincided with a major merger coalescence. We find similar trends in measuring stars by their current radius and by their birth radius, therefore, radial redistribution did not play a dominant role in the formation of a bimodality or its spatial dependence today. Overall, in FIRE-2, strong $α$-element bimodalities are relatively uncommon ($\sim25\%$), often not associated with a major merger, and arise primarily from a rapid decline in star formation during relatively low gas fraction.

AI.tldr: FIRE-2模拟研究发现，银河系质量星系中约25%能产生强烈的α元素双峰分布，这主要由恒星形成率快速下降期间低气体分数条件下的化学演化驱动，而非主要星系合并或径向重分布。
AI.motivation: 研究银河系特征性的α元素双峰分布（如Mg/Fe vs Fe/H）的形成机制，探究其在类似银河系质量星系中的普遍性和形成条件。
AI.method: 使用FIRE-2模拟分析16个银河系质量星系的化学演化，通过[Mg/Fe] vs [Fe/H]分布模式，结合恒星年龄、径向分布、气体分数和恒星形成历史等参数进行综合分析。
AI.result: 16个星系中4个（25%）能产生强烈双峰分布；高α对应年老、径向紧凑的厚盘，低α对应年轻、径向延展的薄盘；过渡期0.3-1.2 Gyr，始于5.5-6.5 Gyr前；主要在低气体分数（5-15%）和恒星形成率快速下降期间形成，仅一例与主要合并相关。
AI.conclusion: α元素双峰分布相对罕见，通常不与主要星系合并相关，主要由低气体分数条件下恒星形成率快速下降导致的超新星类型比例变化（白矮星超新星vs核心坍缩超新星）驱动化学演化形成。
